## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

## Roadmap fit

Which phase does this belong to? (See [docs/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md).)

- [ ] Phase 1 — Listing workbench
- [ ] Phase 2 — Pricing / comps
- [ ] Phase 3 — eBay publishing
- [ ] Phase 4 — Inventory sync
- [ ] Phase 5 — Multi-marketplace publishing
- [ ] Other / unsure

## Scope check

- [ ] This does not require faking marketplace publishing or inventing prices
- [ ] This respects the current MVP boundaries
